title: rubus caliginosus
intro: Rubus caliginosus, also known as the Dark Raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub in the rose family. It is a deciduous plant with edible fruits and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus caliginosus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce blood pressure, and act as an anti-cancer agent. Rubus caliginosus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
